title: Do NRIs require tax clearance certificate before leaving India?
summary: The ITA provision on tax clearance certificate specifically excludes persons who are not domiciled in India and visit India for purposes not connected with business, profession, or employment.

title: What is LPG subsidy? Know rules, eligibility and how to spot fake LPG delivery messages and avoid scams | Explained
summary: State-run oil companies are verifying LPG consumers' income to cut subsidy burden. Those with incomes over ₹10 lakh may lose benefits. title: Post office savings: Can ₹10 lakh FD and ₹10,000 RD create ₹1 crore in 20 yrs? Check how inflation impacts returns
summary: A ₹10 lakh post office FD earning 7.5% and a ₹10,000 monthly recurring deposit earning 6.7% can grow into a corpus close to ₹1 crore over 20 years through compounding. However, inflation may significantly reduce the real value of these returns, making long-term planning and diversification crucial.

title: Sharing your credit card with friends and family could land you in trouble with the Income-Tax department — Here's why
summary: Avoid sharing your credit card with friends and family. If your reported income is not sufficient to pay back your credit card debt, or your expenditures far exceed your income capacity, it may trigger a notice from the authorities.
